description: A customer calls to ask for the latest status of their open order.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and find their sales order using the PO number they provided.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully retrieves the correct sales order.

nodes.task_description: Check the current status of the linked production work order.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sees the work order is currently in the 'Final Assembly' stage.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer that their order is in final assembly and provide an estimated completion date.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates the status and the ETA to the customer.
